title: Add --format and --filter to buildah containers
body:
buildah containers now supports pretty-printing using a Go template
with the --format flag. And output can be filtered based on id, name, or
ancestor.

fixes https://github.com/projectatomic/buildah/issues/424

Signed-off-by: umohnani8 <umohnani@redhat.com>
